info.description: Multi-tenant CRM Backend API with Hexagonal Architecture.
info.title: CRM Backend API

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token
Creates a new country
Retrieves a paginated list of countries based on filters
Creates a new lead category associated with the current tenant
Retrieves a paginated list of lead categories based on filters

get.description: Retrieves a specific lead category belonging to the current tenant
get.summary: Get a lead category by ID

put.description: Updates an existing lead category's details

delete.description: Deletes an existing lead category's details

post.description: Creates a new lead source category/tag associated with the current tenant
Retrieves a paginated list of lead sources based on filters

get.description: Retrieves a specific lead source belonging to the current tenant
get.summary: Get a lead source by ID

put.description: Updates an existing lead source's details

post.description: Creates a new lead associated with the current tenant
Retrieves a paginated list of leads based on filters

get.description: Retrieves a specific lead belonging to the current tenant

post.description: Creates a new lead appointment associated with a specific lead
Retrieves a paginated list of lead appointments for a specific lead

get.summary: Get a lead appointment by ID

put.description: Updates an existing lead appointment (only by organizer)

delete.description: Deletes an existing lead appointment (only by organizer)

post.description: Creates a new lead comment associated with a specific lead
Retrieves a paginated list of lead comments for a specific lead

get.summary: Get a lead comment by ID

put.description: Updates an existing lead comment's content (only by author)

delete.description: Deletes an existing lead comment (only by author)

get.description: Retrieves all existing permissions (policies) in the system.

post.description: Allows assigning a new path and HTTP method permission to a role.
post.summary: Add a permission to a role

delete.description: Removes an existing path and HTTP method permission from a role.
delete.summary: Remove a permission from a role

get.description: Returns all available permission rules organized by resource with human-readable labels
get.summary: Get available permission rules grouped by resource

get.description: Returns all permissions for the currently logged-in user dynamically based on available permission rules
Retrieves all available roles in the system.
Retrieves all inherited roles (groupings) within the system.

post.description: Makes a child role inherit all permissions of a parent role.

get.description: Returns all permission rules grouped by resource, including a boolean indicating if the specified role is assigned each rule.
get.summary: Get all available permissions mapped to a specific role

post.description: Synchronizes a role's permissions by adding or removing rules based on the provided assigned status.
post.summary: Bulk update permissions for a role

post.description: Creates a custom permission rule that can be frontend-only or endpoint-based

put.description: Updates an existing custom permission rule (system rules can only update labels)

delete.description: Deletes a custom permission rule (system rules cannot be deleted)

post.description: Creates a new qualification
Retrieves a paginated list of qualifications based on filters
Creates a new tenant and an initial admin user
Retrieves a list of tenants with optional filtering and pagination

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific tenant

put.description: Updates a tenant's information (name, email, logo, address)

post.description: Creates a new user within the current tenant (scope extracted from JWT)
Retrieves a list of users for the current tenant

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific user

put.description: Updates a user's name and/or role

status.description: using string representation for JSON decoding convenience
